services.title: Welding & Custom Metal Work | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Professional welding and custom metal work in San Diego. Handrails, gates, security doors, anchor bolts, and structural repairs with clear communication and honest pricing.

hero.headline: Real welder for gate, fence, and handrail repairs — plus custom metal work.
hero.subheadline: Gate repair, fence fixes, handrails, and structural welding done properly.

services.intro: I’m a real welder who shows up to repair gates, fences, and handrails — not just someone with a grinder. I also do custom fabrication when you need something built new. Whether it’s fixing an existing gate or building something from scratch, I bring actual welding skill and clean execution to every job.
benefits: Real welding experience — not just basic handyman repairs
Gate and fence repair work done properly
Custom metal work built to fit your home
Clean, professional results with minimal disruption
Clear communication and honest pricing upfront
servicesIncluded: Metal fence and gate latch repairs
process: Free on-site assessment and transparent quote
Clear explanation of options before any work begins
Clean, careful work with surfaces protected
Final walkthrough so you’re completely satisfied
services.pricingNote: Most welding and custom metal jobs range from $350–$950 depending on scope and materials. I’ll always give you a clear written estimate before starting any work.

services.title: Tankless Water Heater Descaling | Handyman Grant San Diego
services.metaDescription: Professional tankless water heater descaling and maintenance in San Diego. Regular service that helps keep your system running efficiently at a fair price.

services.intro: Tankless water heaters need regular descaling to stay efficient and reliable. I provide this maintenance service cleanly and properly so your unit performs the way it should. It’s the kind of ongoing care that helps prevent bigger issues later, and I’m happy to be the guy you call for it.
benefits: Helps restore water flow and heating efficiency
Regular maintenance that can extend the life of your unit
Clean process with proper technique
Clear recommendations so you know when it’s needed again
